summary: Comprehensive testing of new SuperAdmin Portal pages - 16/18 API tests passed (89%), all UI pages render correctly. Fixed audit logs entity_type bug. Two backend issues remain: missing Commission Rules API endpoint and Referrals report DB error.

critical.issue: Endpoint doesn't exist - returns 404 'Commission not found' because 'rules' is being interpreted as a commissionId parameter. CommissionRulesPage.jsx expects CRUD operations on /api/commissions/rules but no such route is defined in commissions.js

minor.issue: 500 error - column Student.referral_code does not exist in PostgreSQL. The reports.js code queries Student.referral_code but the Student model doesn't have this field
FIXED - Was querying entity_type but model uses object_type. Changed to object_type

integration_issues.issue: Page loads with Add Rule button and table but no data because backend API /api/commissions/rules doesn't exist

passed_tests: Login as super admin - redirects to /portal/admin correctly
Sidebar has all 9 navigation items: Dashboard, Applications, Users, Managers, Commission Rules, Payouts, Fraud Alerts, Audit Logs, Reports
GET /api/managers - returns array of managers
GET /api/managers/stats - returns total_managers, total_reps, avg_reps_per_manager
GET /api/fraud-alerts/summary - returns open_count, resolved_this_month, total_count
GET /api/fraud-alerts - returns paginated alerts with proper structure
GET /api/fraud-alerts?status=open - filtering works
GET /api/audit-logs - returns 24 log entries with pagination
GET /api/audit-logs/actions - returns distinct action types
GET /api/audit-logs/entity-types - now works after fix (returns object types)
GET /api/reports/enrollments - returns summary, chart_data, table_data
GET /api/reports/commissions - returns commission stats
GET /api/reports/payouts - returns payout summary
GET /api/reports/lead-funnel - returns funnel with summary and chart_data
GET /api/payouts - returns payout list
GET /api/payouts/stats - returns payout statistics
GET /api/programs - returns programs array
Managers Page - renders stats cards, Add Manager button, table structure
Commission Rules Page - renders stats, Add Rule button, table (empty state)
Payouts Page - renders stats, Create Payout button, table with columns
Fraud Alerts Page - renders stats, status/type filters, table with empty state message
Audit Logs Page - displays 24 events with filters (All Roles, All Actions, All Entities, date range)
Reports Page - all 5 tabs visible: Enrollments, Commissions, Payouts, Lead Funnel, Referrals
Reports Lead Funnel Tab - shows Total Leads, Conversion Rate, Avg Days to Enroll, Funnel Breakdown chart
failed_tests: GET /api/commissions/rules - 404 'Commission not found' - endpoint doesn't exist
GET /api/reports/referrals - 500 error - Student.referral_code column doesn't exist
action_items: CREATE /api/commissions/rules route in backend with CRUD operations (GET list, POST create, PUT update, DELETE) - required for Commission Rules page to work
FIX Student model or reports.js - either add referral_code column to Student model or remove that query from referrals report
critical_code_review_comments: Missing backend route: /api/commissions/rules - CommissionRulesPage.jsx (line 37-49) calls this endpoint but it doesn't exist in commissions.js routes
Database schema mismatch: reports.js references Student.referral_code (line 306) but Student model in /app/backend/src/models/pg/Student.js doesn't have this column
Model vs Route column mismatch: AuditLog model uses object_type/object_id but routes were using entity_type/entity_id - FIXED
seed_data_creation: 24 audit log entries exist showing lead status changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: SuperAdmin Portal pages all render correctly. Fixed audit-logs entity_type bug. Two remaining issues: 1) Commission Rules API endpoint doesn't exist - need to add /api/commissions/rules routes, 2) Referrals report fails because Student.referral_code column doesn't exist in DB.

mocked_integrations.stripe: MOCKED - Stripe payments in mock mode
mocked_integrations.gohighlevel: MOCKED - GoHighLevel notifications in mock mode

managers_page.stats_cards: Total Managers, Total Reps Assigned, Avg Reps per Manager
managers_page.table: Shows MANAGER, STATUS, REPS ASSIGNED, COMMISSION OVERRIDE, TOTAL EARNED, ACTIONS columns
managers_page.empty_state: No managers found message displays correctly

commission_rules_page.stats_cards: Total Rules, Active Rules, Avg Rate
commission_rules_page.table: Shows PRIORITY, RULE NAME, ROLE, PROGRAM, RATE, HOLD PERIOD, STATUS, ACTIONS columns

payouts_page.stats_cards: Total Payouts, Pending, Completed, Pending Amount
payouts_page.table: Shows PAYOUT ID, RECIPIENT, AMOUNT, STATUS, CREATED, ACTIONS columns

fraud_alerts_page.stats_cards: Open Alerts, Resolved This Month, Total Alerts
fraud_alerts_page.table: Shows SEVERITY, TYPE, USER, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, DATE, ACTIONS columns
fraud_alerts_page.empty_state: No fraud alerts found message displays correctly

audit_logs_page.filters: All Roles, All Actions, All Entities dropdowns + date range picker
audit_logs_page.table: Shows TIMESTAMP, ACTOR, ROLE, ACTION, ENTITY, DESCRIPTION, IP columns

reports_page.tabs: Enrollments, Commissions, Payouts, Lead Funnel, Referrals
reports_page.enrollments_tab: Total Enrolled, This Period, Revenue stats
reports_page.lead_funnel_tab: Total Leads, Conversion Rate, Avg Days to Enroll + Funnel Breakdown chart
reports_page.referrals_tab: FAILS with 500 error due to missing DB column
